lane.title: 11 Reel Making
lane.last_task: Correct QISSA V2 plan to on-demand execution-time optimization
lane.last_summary: Owner corrected the prior plan: do not pre-split and pre-enhance the whole raw library into 1-2 second windows. Keep raw clips immutable. Store only lightweight metadata and tags. At execution time, when a specific Meta reel job is defined, copy/select the needed raw clips into a job workspace and optimize only those clips in context: crop, stabilization, speed ramp, clarity enhancement, grade, transition handles, and overlay-safe treatment. This keeps execution lighter and avoids blind enhancement without marketing context.
lane.next_action: Build QISSA V2 as on-demand pipeline: raw vault unchanged -> reel job contract -> selected clip list -> execution-time optimizer -> Remotion/Figma overlay compositor -> QA -> output/cache with settings. Approval desk should show raw source, optimization recipe, and final output separately.
lane.mutation_status: Memory only; no render, no ad spend, no production deploy
lane.proof: Owner direct correction: raw videos should stay as-is; optimization should happen at execution time based on context, not by blindly enhancing the whole library beforehand.
lane.artifacts: PR #400 comment added as shell-only warning; Cloudflare preview remains review artifact only

recent_events.summary: Execution plan locked: do not render another reel directly. Build the reel machine as gated modules: source inventory audit, frame-window scorer, quality/stability gate, clip repair/enhancement lane, transition grammar, transparent overlay grammar, Meta objective contract, variant render lane, approval desk creative PASS/FAIL, and Meta readback learner. The next deliverable is not a better single reel first; it is the intelligence pipeline that makes bad reels impossible to pass.
recent_events.next_action: Start Phase 1: scan raw clip library and create per-window quality ledger with clarity, shake, exposure, crop, food recognizability, transition handles, overlay-safe space, and recommended use. Then use only passing windows for HE Cold Local Classifier V1.
recent_events.mutation_status: Memory only; no creative render, no ad spend, no production deploy
recent_events.proof: Owner asked for exact execution plan and emphasized breaking flow into n pieces for high-output Meta targeting/retargeting reels.
recent_events.artifacts: PR #400 comment added as shell-only warning; Cloudflare preview remains review artifact only

recent_events.task: Define recurring Meta ad-grade reel intelligence architecture
recent_events.summary: Locked the correction from owner feedback: reel-making must be a self-learning intelligence machine, not a direct render tool. Current failure was clip-level selection and brand-safe rendering without frame-level quality gates. New architecture breaks every reel into Meta objective, audience state, proof claim, raw clip candidates, best frame-window selection, clarity/shake/exposure/crop scoring, stabilization/enhancement, transition handles, transparent overlay grammar, Remotion render, visual QA, and Meta readback learning. Text/CTA overlays must sit directly over video as compositor layers without heavy background frames except rare final lockup. Paid tools may be modules such as Topaz Video AI or DaVinci Resolve Studio, but the brain is the HN quality gate and Meta learning loop.
recent_events.next_action: Before another reel: build QISSA Intelligence V2 with frame/window scorer, stabilization/enhancement step, transition-handle selector, transparent overlay design grammar, and approval desk checks that separate technical render pass from creative/ad-grade pass.
recent_events.mutation_status: Memory only; no creative render, no ad spend, no production deploy
recent_events.proof: Owner direct feedback on 2026-06-17: outputs must be high quality, each flow must be broken into pieces, clip clarity/stability/transition are weak, camera shake exists, text overlays should be directly on video without background cards, fonts must stay consistent, and output must serve Meta targeting/retargeting.
recent_events.artifacts: PR #400 comment added as shell-only warning; Cloudflare preview remains review artifact only

recent_events.task: Define professional reel quality gate after V1 rejection
recent_events.summary: Owner rejected current QISSA V1/V3 creative quality as not professional enough. Root issue: engine treated proof-safe footage and brand overlays as sufficient, but did not enforce frame-level quality, stabilization, composition, or premium overlay grammar. Locked V2 definition: every reel must score source windows for clarity/sharpness, stability/shake, exposure, crop/composition, food recognizability, transition handles, and safe overlay space before render. Text/CTA must be Remotion/Figma compositor layers with transparent or near-transparent treatment, no heavy caption-card backgrounds unless final brand lockup requires it. Current PR #400 is shell proof only, not creative-approved.
recent_events.next_action: Build QISSA Quality Gate V2 before rendering another reel: frame scorer, shake rejection/stabilization, clip-window selector, transition-handle selector, transparent overlay grammar, and desk status showing creative FAIL/PASS separately from technical render PASS.
recent_events.mutation_status: Memory + PR comment only; no ad spend, POS, Odoo, or production creative mutation
recent_events.proof: Owner direct feedback: video is shaking, frames not optimized for clarity/stability/transition, Tap Get Directions treatment should be clean overlay without background, UX is bad
recent_events.artifacts: PR #400 comment added as shell-only warning; Cloudflare preview remains review artifact only

recent_events.task: Attach Meta performance intelligence to reel-builder architecture
recent_events.summary: After QISSA v3 design-spine render, compared the first winning Hamza Meta video and current live Meta performance. Conclusion: QISSA v3 is technically and visually locked, but it is only a food-conviction reel. The repeatable engine still needs a Meta creative-intelligence layer before rendering: funnel stage, audience source, desired event, UTM content, proof ladder, CTA timing, and next retargeting pool. First winning video succeeded as a belief/location classifier: place, old Hamza memory, seating, food, parcel, brand proof, directions. Best current Jun campaign signal is broad local-food HKP2km adset at Rs0.34 CPC and 6.21% CTR; narrow warm dinner/late adsets were expensive. Next reel template should be Cold Local Classifier V1, not another narrow dish reel.
recent_events.next_action: Build one new QISSA spec family for HE Cold Local Classifier: 24-31s, first 2s HKP/Shivajinagar place proof, old Hamza/1918 memory, Express format reset, seating/comfort, exact food proof, parcel/takeaway, final directions CTA; add meta_contract fields to qissa_factory validation before scaling.

recent_events.task: Upgrade QISSA HE Meta reel from proof-safe to ad-grade v2

recent_events.task: Take over reel-making lane and verify local/fleet render stack
recent_events.summary: Read the Claude reel-making handoff, local HE Remotion engine, HE raw-clip workflow, CLIP-INTELLIGENCE, May 25 classification, MENU, FILMING-GUIDE, and VIDEO-CREATIVE-SPINE. Verified hn-rtx-worker over Tailscale: Ubuntu Linux, RTX 3060 12GB, NVIDIA driver 595.71.05/CUDA 13.2, ffmpeg h264_nvenc/hevc_nvenc/av1_nvenc present, 1s h264_nvenc smoke test passed. Worker already has /home/nihaf/hn-video-workspace/he-video-engine and HE-Raw-Clips, but npm/npx is absent and node_modules/.bin/remotion is not currently runnable; existing scripts render with libx264 unless changed. Recommended repeatable Tier-1 template: tandoori_tikka_food_conviction using safe exact tandoori/tikka footage only.
recent_events.next_action: Build the Tandoori/Tikka Food Conviction reel template first: H10 fire hook -> Z08 tandoor process -> H34 tandoori plate -> H40 tikka plate -> H49 tandoori plate -> Z05 storefront -> FollowCTA/Get Directions. Create storyboard/contact sheet, render MP4, QA 1080x1920 H.264, first-frame nonblank, text/CTA safe zones, and footage honesty.
